plan_review_notes: Approve the read-only MCP artifact surface slice: expose task-scoped artifact graph, slot bindings, verification claims, and promotion/invalidation summaries from the existing feature-task projection without adding mutation tooling.

plan_review_history.notes: Approve the read-only MCP artifact surface slice: expose task-scoped artifact graph, slot bindings, verification claims, and promotion/invalidation summaries from the existing feature-task projection without adding mutation tooling.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to read-only MCP artifact inspection for feature tasks only. Reuse the typed artifact projection path and keep mutation tooling out of this slice.

normal_cases.name: A verified feature task exposes artifact graph, slot bindings, verification claims, and promotion summary resources through MCP.

edge_cases.name: A feature task that has not passed verify still returns a candidate projection and a non-promotable summary without failing the resource read.

exception_cases.name: Unsupported task types or missing required task docs return actionable errors when reading artifact resources.

verification_methods.target: A verified feature task exposes artifact graph, slot bindings, verification claims, and promotion summary resources through MCP.
A feature task that has not passed verify still returns a candidate projection and a non-promotable summary without failing the resource read.
Unsupported task types or missing required task docs return actionable errors when reading artifact resources.
